name: GrabAGun Digital Holdings Inc.
business: GrabAGun is a digitally native and multi-brand eCommerce retailer of firearms, ammunition and related accessories, sourcing products from over 2,000 brands and selling to consumers online, with firearms delivered via federal firearm licensed dealers.

exposures.sentence: We are a digitally native and multi-brand eCommerce retailer of firearms, ammunition and related accessories.

PEW Logistics functions as an operation platform that provides a variety of logistics services, including warehousing, inventory management, order processing, picking and packing, shipping coordination, and return management for manufacturers and brands operating within the firearm and outdoor products industry.
Cryptocurrency payment options as a direct response to growing demand from our customers for more flexible and modern payment solutions.
Breaches of data security and the failure to protect our information technology systems from cybersecurity threats could adversely impact our business.

Artificial intelligence (broadly defined as the simulation of human intelligence in machines that are programmed to think, reason, learn or make decisions) (AI) driven supply chain software solutions and automated compliance technology that facilitate a hassle-free, efficient, and intuitive buying process from start to finish.

catalysts.sentence: On October 15, 2025, the Company formed PEW Logistics LLC, a Texas limited liability company, as a direct, wholly-owned subsidiary of the Company, for the purpose of providing next-generation, white-labeled direct-to-consumer (D2C) fulfillment solutions to modernize the firearm supply chain.

catalysts.event: Business Loan Agreement with BOKF for new headquarters
catalysts.sentence: On November 25, 2025, the Company, through its indirectly wholly-owned subsidiary, 4880 Alpha LLC, entered into a Business Loan Agreement with BOKF, NA dba Bank of Texas (the Lender), pursuant to which the Lender extended a delayed draw term loan to 4880 Alpha LLC up to a maximum principal amount of $8.5 million.

catalysts.event: Common stock begins trading on NYSE Texas
catalysts.sentence: On October 21, 2025, the Company's common stock also began trading on a new stock exchange, the NYSE Texas.
